title: New Republic Presidential election, 23 ABY

The '''New Republic Presidential election of [[23 ABY/Legends|23 ABY]]''' saw [[Borsk Fey'lya]] succeed [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] as [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], following Organa Solo's resignation. In an unusual vote for the highly fragmented [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]], Fey'lya (often considered one of the most polarizing [[Senator/Legends|senators]]) won a three-fifths supermajority in the first round of voting.

The election was a decisive turning point in New Republic politics and in the state of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] at large. Fey'lya had been trying to increase his personal power since his time with the [[New Republic Provisional Council]], and had made both a number of allies and enemies along the way. One of those enemies was [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]], [[Supreme Commander (Alliance)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] of the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]]; Ackbar retired just after Fey'lya's election, and one of Fey'lya's first acts in office was to replace him with [[Sien Sovv]]. The retirements of Ackbar and Organa Solo, and the death of [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] the [[24 ABY/Legends|next year]], finally removed from office the triumvirate that had led the New Republic and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] for nearly two and a half decades.

The election also led to [[Hiram Drayson/Legends|Hiram Drayson's]] resignation, and tempted Organa Solo to re-enter politics, although she was dissuaded by her brother, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]].

Also shortly after his election, Fey'lya apparently eliminated the position of [[Minister of State]] and created the [[New Republic Advisory Council]], staffing it with [[Senator/Legends|senators]], many of whom were believed to have questionable beliefs or business practices, as well as [[Anti-Jedi sentiment/Legends|anti-Jedi sentiments]].

It was largely the ineffectualness of the Fey'lya administration voted in by this election that caused such great devastation of the galaxy during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].
